title: Personal Lines Quote Intake
description: Comprehensive multi-line insurance quote collection form. Select insurance types and provide relevant property/auto/life details.

field_mapping._comment: Configuration for mapping parsed policy data (vehicles, insureds, drivers) to form field names. Allows the same extraction logic to work across different form schemas.

license_state._comment: Map state names to state codes (normalize Claude's extraction)

relationship_to_insured._comment: Map relationship descriptions to option values

education_levels.label: No High School Diploma or GED

sections.title: Insurance Selection
sections.description: What types of insurance are you interested in? Select Policy Start Date and how you heard about us.

fields.name: referral_source
fields.label: How did you hear about us?

sections.title: Primary Applicant
sections.description: Tell us about the primary applicant.

fields.name: sms_consent
fields.label: SMS Consent
fields.checkbox_label: By checking this box, you consent to receive text messages from Healey Insurance Group Services at the mobile number provided regarding your insurance inquiries, quotes, policy updates, and promotional/marketing messages. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency varies. Reply HELP for help or STOP to cancel. View our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
